creator: exploringlondon
caption:
A free @lorealparis pop-up has landed in Old Spitalfields Market, celebrating International Women’s Day this weekend!

💄 Get a free L’Oréal Paris lipstick for free and have it engraved (all you have to do is have a @bootsuk advantage card)
📮 Write a postcard to that special woman in your life and they’ll send it to them for you free!
📸 Check out their free photo booth 
🥞 Get a free crepe at their crepe station
💋 There’s also a Worth It photo opportunity at the end!

Details here:
📍Old Spitalfields Market
🗓️ 7th - 8th March 2026
⏰ Sat 10am-6pm, Sun 10am-5pm

#londonpopup

transcription.text: There's a new pop-up in the middle of Old Spitalfields Market, all to celebrate International Women's Day. This L'Oréal Paris pop-up is on for this weekend only and they have lots going on. First up, you can engrave your own L'Oréal Paris lipstick for free if you have a Boots Advantage card. Just write down the message you want and watch them engrave it live. Next up, you can send a postcard to that special woman in your life and they will send it to them for free. There's also a free photo booth so you can take home some snaps. And finally, there's even a crepe station where you can have a delicious free crepe. It's on for this weekend only. Find the details in the caption.
